nodes.name: LLM Synthesis: Brand Positioning
nodes.notes: SETUP: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID with your n8n OpenAI credential ID. Find it in n8n > Settings > Credentials > your OpenAI credential > the numeric ID in the URL. The chatModel field defaults to gpt-4o — update if your runtime uses a different model.

storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — signal extraction, prompt building, and LLM synthesis run in both modes. In cloud mode: (1) market_intelligence is read from the n8n trigger input payload instead of disk, (2) AJV schema validation is skipped (replaced by inline enum/structure checks), (3) artifact write and checkpoint update are skipped. brand_positioning is returned inline.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1 (after build-market-intelligence). Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, store_profile, market_intelligence, normalized_intake_payload, runtime_config }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_name, artifact_path, brand_positioning, runtime_config, status, notes [, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings] }
setupRequired: Replace REPLACE_WITH_N8N_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL_ID in 'LLM Synthesis: Brand Positioning' with your n8n OpenAI credential ID.
Self-hosted: ensure STORE_OS_AJV_SCHEMA_PATH points to the schemas/ directory and ajv@8 is installed in n8n node_modules.
Cloud mode: OpenAI credential must be configured in n8n. market_intelligence must be forwarded inline from orchestrate-phase1's Prepare Brand Positioning Input node.
cloudSkipped: AJV schema validation — no local schema files in n8n Cloud (replaced by inline enum/structure checks in Code node)
Artifact write (brand-positioning.json) — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
Checkpoint update — no filesystem in n8n Cloud
directFieldEnforcement: brand_role — user intake value overrides LLM output when non-null
objection_handling_style — user intake value overrides LLM output when non-null
notes: All LLM outputs are synthesis-based planning hypotheses — not finalized brand strategy.
Direct fields from intake are enforced after LLM synthesis to prevent drift from user decisions.
Inline enum and structure validation runs in both cloud and self-hosted mode. Full AJV validation is self-hosted only.
forbidden_impressions merges intake.must_not_feel_like + intake.forbidden_styles + LLM-inferred additions.
Temperature 0.3 for deterministic structured output. Max tokens 1500 covers all required schema fields.
Downstream consumers: build-pattern-manifest, build-design-system, build-product-content, build-collection-content (all out of scope for Phase 2).
